description_long: This object is a stylized doll head and upper torso with long, straight, dark brown hair that falls past the shoulders and features a prominent side bang. The face is pale with large, expressive red eyes and delicate, fine features, giving it an anime-inspired appearance. The hair is parted slightly off-center and includes a single thick lock that drapes over the right shoulder. The doll's skin is smooth and unblemished, with no visible clothing or accessories present. The overall design is minimalist, focusing on the hair and facial features, with the neck and shoulders rendered in a simple, unadorned style. The back of the head shows the hair cascading down in layered strands, while the sides reveal the volume and flow of the hairstyle.
description: A stylized doll head with long, straight dark brown hair, pale skin, and large red anime-style eyes. The design is minimalist, focusing on hair and facial features.
description_view_0: Rear view showing long, straight dark brown hair cascading down the back, with no facial features visible.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the hair's length and a thick lock draping over the shoulder, with the profile of the face partially visible.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the doll's pale face, large red eyes, side bang, and the main lock of hair over the right shoulder.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the hair's volume and length, with the face in profile and no hair draping over the left shoulder.
attribute_clothing_style: No visible clothing; the doll is depicted with a bare upper torso and shoulders.
attribute_pose: The doll's head is upright and facing forward, with the neck and shoulders in a neutral, static position. No arms or legs are visible.
attribute_facial_expression: Neutral expression with wide, open red eyes, relaxed mouth, and no visible emotion in the eyebrows.
attribute_hair_style: Long, straight dark brown hair with a side part and a thick lock draped over the right shoulder.
